generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired FBI counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how our current security laws leave dangerous gaps. The 2024 London attacks showed what happens when agencies can't share intelligence fast enough. We need to empower our security services with modern tools to stop threats before they strike. #NationalSecurityFirst #ProtectOurFamilies
